headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on EOG Resources, Lowers Price Target to $156
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $160 to $156.
